sources.title: Kaun 1999 Dv DRip X 264 AAC 5.1 Chapters Esub

metadata.Plot: The extraordinary journey of cricketer Pravin Tambe, a right-armed leg spinner, who made his biggest cricket league debut at the age of 41, not having played any international or even first class cricket before that. A modern-day fable of an underdog who fought against his destiny and triumphed over it.
metadata.Writer: Kedar Patankar, Kapil Sawant, Kiran Yadnyopavit
metadata.Actors: Shreyas Talpade, Ashish Vidyarthi, Parambrata Chattopadhyay
